creator: empty.japan
caption:
Nobody knows about it, but actually it is one of the best places to enjoy Sakura without any crowds 🌸 and one of my personal favorite Shrines in all of Japan ⛩️
Get ready to overcome 742 stone steps on the way to that legendary 12-meter long pass that will test your soul 🫣 I know it’s just a legend, but I still have chills every time when I walk through it…
📍Aga Shrine, Shiga
🚂 2 hours by public transport from Kyoto station
